# idiographic

> **Network estimation from intensive longitudinal data** —
> person-specific and within-person temporal, contemporaneous, and
> between-subject networks from ESM / EMA / diary panels, through one
> tidy verb per method.

`idiographic` estimates dynamic networks from intensive longitudinal
data (ILD): ordinary and regularized vector autoregression, multilevel
VAR, native Bayesian multilevel VAR that matches Mplus DSEM, unified
SEM, and GIMME — plus the supporting workflow (preprocessing audits,
edge-stability diagnostics, rolling windows, forecast validation, and
model comparison). Every result is a tidy object you access with the
same handful of verbs:
[`edges()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/edges.md),
[`nodes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/nodes.md),
[`coefs()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/coefs.md),
[`matrices()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/matrices.md),
[`summary()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/summary.html), and
[`plot()`](https://rdrr.io/r/graphics/plot.default.html).

## Clean-room by design

**Every estimator is a clean-room reimplementation**, written from the
published algorithms rather than by wrapping another package — and each
is validated for numerical equivalence against its reference:

| Estimator | Method | Validated against | Agreement |
|----|----|----|----|
| [`graphical_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/graphical_var.md) | Regularized graphical VAR (graphical lasso + EBIC) | `graphicalVAR` | ~1e-10 |
| [`build_mlvar()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar.md) | Two-step multilevel VAR (`lmer`, fixed effects) | `mlVAR` (`estimator = "lmer"`) | ~1e-10 (machine precision) |
| [`build_mlvar_bayes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar_bayes.md) | Native Bayesian multilevel VAR / **DSEM** | real **Mplus DSEM** + Stan/JAGS | Monte-Carlo error |
| [`build_var_bayes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_var_bayes.md) | Native Bayesian VAR(1) | real **Mplus** `ESTIMATOR = BAYES` | ~1e-3 |
| `.glasso_fit()` (internal) | Graphical lasso | `glasso` (KKT-checked) | ~1e-11 |

Because the algorithms are native, the package’s runtime footprint is
minimal — **Imports: `stats`, `utils`, `lme4`, `lavaan`** only. `mlVAR`,
`graphicalVAR`, `glasso`, and `MplusAutomation` are *Suggests* used
solely to regenerate the validation fixtures; they are **not needed to
run any estimator**.

The Bayesian DSEM sampler is a particular highlight:
[`build_mlvar_bayes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar_bayes.md)
reproduces the output of `mlVAR::mlVAR(estimator = "Mplus")` — Mplus’s
two-level Bayesian VAR with latent mean centering — **without Mplus
installed**, using a pure-R conjugate Gibbs sampler with hand-rolled
inverse-Wishart draws (no `MCMCpack`/`rstan`). It was validated against
real Mplus 9 output, an independent Stan/JAGS implementation (Li et al.,
2022), real openESM datasets, and the published network findings of
Bringmann et al. (2013).

## Installation

From the author’s r-universe (recommended — no compilation, binaries
included):

``` r

install.packages("idiographic",
                 repos = c("https://mohsaqr.r-universe.dev",
                           "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
```

Or from GitHub:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("mohsaqr/idiographic")
```

Plotting uses the [`cograph`](https://github.com/mohsaqr/snajs) package;
it stays optional and is offered for on-demand install the first time
you call [`plot()`](https://rdrr.io/r/graphics/plot.default.html).

## Quick start

``` r

library(idiographic)

## simulate an ESM panel: 30 people, 40 beeps, 3 items
set.seed(1)
panel <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:30, function(id) {
  y <- matrix(0, 40, 3)
  for (t in 2:40) y[t, ] <- c(0.35, 0.30, 0.25) * y[t - 1, ] + rnorm(3)
  data.frame(id = id, beep = 1:40, A = y[, 1], B = y[, 2], C = y[, 3])
}))

## multilevel VAR: temporal, contemporaneous, and between networks
fit <- build_mlvar(panel, vars = c("A", "B", "C"), id = "id", beep = "beep")

fit                 # tidy printout of all three networks
edges(fit)          # one row per edge (network, from, to, weight)
coefs(fit)          # fixed-effect estimates with SE / p / CI
plot(fit)           # draw all layers with cograph
plot(fit, layer = "temporal")
```

Everything is a **tidy verb with named arguments returning a tidy
`data.frame`** — you never index into a result object to reach a
sub-network or a coefficient.

### Native Bayesian DSEM (no Mplus needed)

``` r

bayes <- build_mlvar_bayes(panel, vars = c("A", "B", "C"),
                           id = "id", beep = "beep",
                           n_iter = 4000, n_chains = 2)
bayes               # posterior medians, SDs, 95% CIs, convergence (max PSR)
coefs(bayes)

## full DSEM with person-specific slopes, random residuals, and
## within-model imputation of missing observations (needs enough subjects to
## identify the random-effect covariance: at least 2 * (p + p^2) + 1):
build_mlvar_bayes(panel, vars = c("A", "B", "C"), id = "id", beep = "beep",
                  temporal = "random", residual = "random", impute = TRUE)
```

## What’s included

**Estimators**

- [`build_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_var.md) /
  [`build_var_each()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_var_each.md)
  — ordinary VAR(1) (OLS), pooled or per subject
- [`graphical_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/graphical_var.md)
  /
  [`graphical_var_each()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/graphical_var_each.md)
  — regularized graphical VAR (GLASSO + EBIC)
- [`build_mlvar()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar.md)
  — two-step multilevel VAR (temporal, contemporaneous, between)
- [`build_mlvar_bayes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar_bayes.md)
  — native Bayesian multilevel VAR / DSEM (fixed or random slopes, fixed
  or random residual covariance, optional within-model imputation)
- [`build_var_bayes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_var_bayes.md)
  — native Bayesian VAR(1)
- [`build_mlvar_mplus()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar_mplus.md)
  — true-Mplus backend (wraps `mlVAR(estimator = "Mplus")`)
- [`build_usem()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_usem.md)
  — unified Structural Equation Modeling (lavaan)
- [`build_gimme()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_gimme.md)
  — Group Iterative Multiple Model Estimation

**Workflow & diagnostics**

- [`audit_preprocess()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/audit_preprocess.md)
  — preprocessing audit for ILD (compliance, variance, stationarity)
- [`estimate_stability()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/estimate_stability.md)
  — bootstrap edge-stability diagnostics
- [`rolling_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/rolling_var.md)
  /
  [`rolling_graphical_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/rolling_graphical_var.md)
  — rolling-window (time-varying) networks
- [`validate_forecast()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/validate_forecast.md)
  — rolling out-of-sample forecast validation
- [`compare_idiographic()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/compare_idiographic.md)
  — model-comparison reports

**Tidy accessors (work on every result)**

[`edges()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/edges.md) ·
[`nodes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/nodes.md) ·
[`coefs()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/coefs.md) ·
[`matrices()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/matrices.md) ·
[`summary()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/summary.html) ·
[`print()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/print.html) ·
[`plot()`](https://rdrr.io/r/graphics/plot.default.html) /
[`plot_gimme()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_gimme.md) ·
[`as_netobject()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/as_netobject.md)

## Bundled data

- `srl` — a self-regulated-learning ESM dataset (`data(srl)`)
- `inst/extdata/esm_demo.tsv` — a small synthetic demo panel

## Documentation

Full function reference and articles:
**<https://saqr.me/idiographic/>**.

## Citation

Saqr, M. (2026). *idiographic: Network Estimation from Intensive
Longitudinal Data*. R package. <https://github.com/mohsaqr/idiographic>

## License

GPL-3.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`as_netobject()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/as_netobject.md)
  : Coerce to a netobject

- [`as_netobject(`*`<gvar_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/as_netobject.gvar_result.md)
  : Coerce a gvar_result to plottable netobjects

- [`as_netobject(`*`<net_gimme>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/as_netobject.net_gimme.md)
  : Plottable netobject(s) from a GIMME fit

- [`as_netobject(`*`<net_mlvar>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/as_netobject.net_mlvar.md)
  : Plottable netobjects from an mlVAR fit

- [`as_netobject(`*`<var_bayes_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/as_netobject.var_bayes_result.md)
  : Coerce a var_bayes_result to plottable netobjects

- [`audit_preprocess()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/audit_preprocess.md)
  : Audit preprocessing and lag construction

- [`build_gimme()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_gimme.md)
  : GIMME: Group Iterative Multiple Model Estimation

- [`build_mlvar()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar.md)
  : Build a Multilevel Vector Autoregression (mlVAR) network

- [`build_mlvar_bayes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar_bayes.md)
  : Build a Bayesian multilevel VAR network (Mplus DSEM equivalent)

- [`build_mlvar_mplus()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_mlvar_mplus.md)
  : Build an Mplus-backed multilevel VAR network

- [`build_usem()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_usem.md)
  : Build a user-specified unified SEM network

- [`build_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_var.md) :
  Build an ordinary least-squares VAR network

- [`build_var_bayes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_var_bayes.md)
  : Build a Bayesian VAR(1) network (unregularized Mplus-equivalent)

- [`build_var_each()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/build_var_each.md)
  : Fit an ordinary least-squares VAR for every subject

- [`coefs()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/coefs.md) : Tidy
  coefficients from a fitted mlvar model

- [`compare_idiographic()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/compare_idiographic.md)
  : Compare idiographic estimators on one dataset

- [`edges()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/edges.md) : Tidy
  edge table for any idiographic result

- [`estimate_stability()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/estimate_stability.md)
  : Estimate edge stability by block resampling

- [`extract_edges()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/extract_edges.md)
  : Tidy edge table from a network object

- [`graphical_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/graphical_var.md)
  : Graphical VAR Estimation

- [`graphical_var_each()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/graphical_var_each.md)
  : Fit a graphical VAR for every subject

- [`matrices()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/matrices.md) :
  Print model matrices for idiographic results

- [`nodes()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/nodes.md) : Tidy
  per-node strength table for any idiographic result

- [`plot_gimme()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_gimme.md)
  :

  Faithful GIMME network plot (the `gimme`-package convention, via
  cograph)

- [`plot(`*`<var_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<gvar_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<var_bayes_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<net_mlvar>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<net_usem>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<net_gimme>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<var_list>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<gvar_list>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<rolling_var_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<rolling_gvar_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  [`plot(`*`<stability_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/plot_idiographic.md)
  : Plot an idiographic network result

- [`print(`*`<forecast_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.forecast_result.md)
  : Print method for forecast validation results

- [`print(`*`<gvar_list>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.gvar_list.md)
  : Print a list of per-subject graphical VARs

- [`print(`*`<gvar_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.gvar_result.md)
  : Print Method for gvar_result

- [`print(`*`<model_comparison>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.model_comparison.md)
  : Print method for model comparisons

- [`print(`*`<net_gimme>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.net_gimme.md)
  : Print Method for net_gimme

- [`print(`*`<net_mlvar>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.net_mlvar.md)
  : Print method for net_mlvar

- [`print(`*`<net_mlvar_bayes>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.net_mlvar_bayes.md)
  : Print method for net_mlvar_bayes

- [`print(`*`<net_usem>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.net_usem.md)
  : Print method for uSEM fits

- [`print(`*`<preprocess_audit>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.preprocess_audit.md)
  : Print method for preprocessing audits

- [`print(`*`<rolling_gvar_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.rolling_gvar_result.md)
  : Print method for rolling graphical VAR results

- [`print(`*`<rolling_var_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.rolling_var_result.md)
  : Print method for rolling VAR results

- [`print(`*`<stability_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.stability_result.md)
  : Print method for stability results

- [`print(`*`<var_bayes_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.var_bayes_result.md)
  : Print method for var_bayes_result

- [`print(`*`<var_list>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.var_list.md)
  : Print a list of per-subject ordinary VARs

- [`print(`*`<var_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/print.var_result.md)
  : Print method for ordinary VAR fits

- [`rolling_graphical_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/rolling_graphical_var.md)
  : Estimate rolling-window graphical VAR networks

- [`rolling_var()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/rolling_var.md)
  : Estimate rolling-window ordinary VAR networks

- [`srl`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/srl.md) : Self-regulated
  learning intensive longitudinal data (Chapter 20)

- [`summary(`*`<gvar_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/summary.gvar_result.md)
  : Summary Method for gvar_result

- [`summary(`*`<net_gimme>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/summary.net_gimme.md)
  : Summary Method for net_gimme

- [`summary(`*`<net_mlvar>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/summary.net_mlvar.md)
  : Summary method for net_mlvar

- [`summary(`*`<net_usem>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/summary.net_usem.md)
  : Summary method for uSEM fits

- [`summary(`*`<var_bayes_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/summary.var_bayes_result.md)
  : Summary method for var_bayes_result

- [`summary(`*`<var_result>`*`)`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/summary.var_result.md)
  : Summary method for ordinary VAR fits

- [`validate_forecast()`](https://saqr.me/idiographic/reference/validate_forecast.md)
  : Validate one-step forecasts from idiographic VAR models

### All vignettes

- [10. Comparing
  methods](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/comparing-methods.md):
- [7. GIMME](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/gimme.md):
- [3. Graphical
  VAR](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/graphical-var.md):
- [1. Getting started with
  idiographic](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/idiographic.md):
- [5. Multilevel VAR
  (mlVAR)](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/mlvar.md):
- [2. Ordinary
  VAR](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/ordinary-var.md):
- [8. Rolling
  networks](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/rolling-networks.md):
- [9. Stability and forecast
  validation](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/stability-and-forecasting.md):
- [4. Subject-by-subject
  networks](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/subject-networks.md):
- [6. Unified SEM (uSEM)](https://saqr.me/idiographic/articles/usem.md):
